description: claw-code local model profiles. This config is intentionally separate from upstream claw-code source so frequent upstream updates do not collide with local model work.

gemma-4-e4b.name: Gemma 4 E4B IT
gemma-4-e4b.notes: Use with a local OpenAI-compatible server that exposes this model id or an alias through /v1/chat/completions.

gemma-4-e2b.name: Gemma 4 E2B IT
gemma-4-e2b.notes: Smaller Gemma 4 profile for lighter local machines.

qwen-coder-7b.name: Qwen2.5 Coder 7B Instruct
qwen-coder-7b.notes: Recommended local coding default when available.

qwen-coder-3b.name: Qwen2.5 Coder 3B Instruct
qwen-coder-3b.notes: Good laptop profile when 7B is too heavy.

llamacpp.note: Start llama-server with --alias matching the selected profile, or set LOCAL_MODEL_ID.
